actionUnits.condition: Manual pause toggle because input actions (Left/Right .action.started) are not simulated in this test. Target MonoBehaviour component matches PauseMenu.PauseMenu (script guid: 28d50a2d56ade1341ae8d933ebdfbe0c, component fileID: 4460531382388078979) with serialized refs: Pausemenu=8695547647749308152, LocomotionSystem=4940586921621305979, ray_Right=4460531382215018888, ray_Left=4460531383235625767, RightTeleport=true, LeftTeleport=false, TeleportManagzerLeft=3207614173264834952, TeleportManagzerRight=2565836327702532538. XR Rig has Rigidbody and a trigger CapsuleCollider (id: 378614788), so Trigger is allowed. Expected on first toggle from initial state (started=false): Show() runs, setting Time.timeScale=0, enabling rays and Pausemenu, disabling locomotion and both teleport managers.

Manual pause toggle because input actions (Left/Right .action.started) are not simulated in this test. Serialized config in scene: Pausemenu=8695547647749308152, LocomotionSystem=4940586921621305979, ray_Right=4460531382215018888, ray_Left=4460531383235625767, RightTeleport=true, LeftTeleport=false, TeleportManagzerLeft=3207614173264834952, TeleportManagzerRight=2565836327702532538. XR Rig has Rigidbody and a trigger CapsuleCollider (id: 378614788), so Trigger is allowed. Expected on first toggle from initial state (started=false): Show() runs, setting Time.timeScale=0, enabling rays and Pausemenu, disabling LocomotionSystem and both teleport managers.

Second manual toggle to cover Hide() branch. With RightTeleport=true and LeftTeleport=false (per scene), Hide() should set Time.timeScale=1, disable rays and Pausemenu, enable LocomotionSystem, and re-enable TeleportManagzerRight only.
